analysis_description: Round 3 tapes days 0–2: Black–Scholes implied volatility from mid prices (r=0, T = effective DTE/365 with DTE_eff = (8−csv_day) − intraday_progress; intraday_progress = (timestamp//100)/10000 per plot_iv_smile_round3.py, aligned with round3description.txt calendar mapping). Per timestamp: IV at strike nearest S, OTM call minus OTM put IV skew, cross-strike IV std, vega-weight share at ATM (BS vega at fitted IV), bid-ask spread at ATM. Rolling z on extract log returns (window 50) for co-movement with smile width.
used_to_decide: Frankfurt switch_mean (EMA of |theo_diff−mean|) on tape stayed below default IV_SCALPING_THR=0.7 (max ~0.54 on day 0), so traders lower IV_THR_BASE and scale it in burst/calm. ATM bid-ask ~2.3–2.6 by day. Weak corr(|z|, iv_cross_std) ~0.06–0.09 suggests z is a regime switch more than linear smile predictor; still used for burst vs calm quoting. Chose ATM-relative strike filter to drop deep wings where smile model misprices.

analysis_description: Additional IV/moneyness regime study from ROUND_3 prices: derive BS IV by strike with T from round3description day mapping (8/7/6 open) and intraday wind. Compute burst regime from extract |z(log-return)| with window 50 and summarize next-tick mid reversion proxy by moneyness bands: calm_core (|K/S-1|<=0.10), burst_ring (0.10-0.26), far_wing.
used_to_decide: Proxy means show burst windows weaker than calm (both calm_core and burst_ring near/under zero during burst), motivating less aggressive burst quoting while preserving calm smile MM. This directly informed v5: raised burst IV gate and burst THR_OPEN, with low-z calm inventory flattening fallback.

analysis_description: VEV_4000 moneyness vs extract mid on ROUND_3 days 0-2: at each timestamp compute |4000/S-1| with S=VELVETFRUIT_EXTRACT mid. TTE mapping unchanged (round3description + plot_iv_smile intraday). Output: day-level fraction in band for ATM_REL=0.22 vs 0.24. IV remains implicit in strike selection for burst cluster width.
used_to_decide: On days 0-2, |4000/S-1| is ~0.238 mean; 0% of ticks have |K/S-1|<=0.22 while 62-86% have <=0.24. Tightening burst to 0.22 drops all VEV_4000 quotes (falsifies narrow burst-only wing pull). v7 keeps 0.24 burst band and instead caps burst order size: best PnL so far (487) vs v5 (433).
